description: In their cell, Enoch wallows in self-pity after being decommissioned by other Chronicoms, believing he no longer has purpose. Fitz urges Enoch to help him create a spark using the sulfur-rich blood of a dead Crepetolian to blow the cell door open, convincing Enoch of his worth and their friendship. The two manage to ignite the blood as a distraction for their escape, reigniting their camaraderie.
location: Kitson (alien casino planet / House of Games)

transcript.line: Shut down. Which can only mean I am decommissioned. I am useless now. I have soiled the integrity of Chronicoms. The name Enoch will be an unspeakable sound.
